artifacts.summary: Direct multi-family BFMCS construction indexed by discreteClosedMCS members
Implementation summary documenting completed work and remaining sorries

verification.notes: 3 sorries in new module: modal_forward (2) and modal_backward t!=0 (1). This is an improvement over ClosedFlagIntBFMCS which had 3+ modal sorries including coverage gap at t=0. The modal_backward at t=0 is now sorry-free.

partial_progress.details: Phases 3 and 4 are partial because some sorries remain due to fundamental S5 limitation in TM logic and chain divergence at t!=0. These are documented limitations, not implementation gaps.

review_reason: Implementation complete but has 3 sorries. Modal_backward at t=0 is sorry-free (improvement). Cross-family modal_forward requires S5 accessibility not provable in TM. User should confirm this is acceptable architecture.
